name: Chop Suey with Tuna
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook celery and onion in 2 tablespoons water over low heat, covered.
2. When tender, remove from heat, add rice, 3/4 cup water, and seasonings.
3. Bring to a boil. Turn heat to low and cook covered until rice is tender and liquid absorbed (about 30 minutes).
4. Add tuna. Mix and remove from heat. Set aside, covered, for a few minutes before serving.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 MEAT EXCHANGE
Source: Recipes for Diabetics by Billie Little with Penny L. Thorup
Served: Not specified in the original text
